005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.DoNothingAuton;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.BC_Dots.LBCenterDotDot;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.BC_Dots.LeftDot;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.BC_Dots.RBCenterDotDot;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.BC_Dots.RightDot;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.depot.CenterDepot;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.FrontHubShootPreloads;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.LBDumpy;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.RBDumpy;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.compound.StopShooting;
018// import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.depot.centerDepot;
019import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.LBOnePointFiveSpiralAngled;
020import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.LBOneSweepAngled;
021import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.LBTwoSweepAngled;
022import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetForward;
023import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetIdle;
024import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetForward;
025import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetIdle;
026import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeAgitateFastOnce;
027import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetHomingDown;
028import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIdle;
029import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIntake;
030import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetOuttake;
031import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.leds.LEDDefaultCommand;
032import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterAddToBonusVelocity;
033import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterResetBonusVelocity;
034import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetFerry;
035import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetManual;
036import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetShoot;
037import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterWaitForSpinUp;
038import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveDrive;
039import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveResetRotation;
040import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveXMode;
041import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone;
042import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToHub;
043import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Field;
044import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
045import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.feeder.Feeder;
046import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.handoff.Handoff;
047import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake.Intake;
048import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.leds.LEDController;
049import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
050import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
051import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.vision.LimelightVision;
052import com.stuypulse.robot.util.PathUtil.AutonConfig;
053
054import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SendableChooser;
055import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SmartDashboard;
056import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
057import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Commands;
058import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.WaitCommand;
059import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController;
060import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.Trigger;
061import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine.Direction;
062
063/**
064 * <h2>Robot Container Class</h2>
065 * 
066 * This class is where the bulk of the robot should be declared. Since Command-based is a
067 * "declarative" paradigm, very little robot logic should actually be handled in the {@link Robot}
068 * periodic methods (other than the scheduler calls). Instead, the structure of the robot (including
069 * subsystems, commands, and trigger mappings) should be declared here.
070 */
071public class RobotContainer {
072
073    // Gamepads
074    public final CommandXboxController driver = new CommandXboxController(Ports.Gamepad.DRIVER);
075
076    // Subsystem
077    private final Feeder feeder = Feeder.getInstance();
078
079    private final Intake intake = Intake.getInstance();
080
081    private final Shooter shooter = Shooter.getInstance();
082
083    private final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
084
085    private final LimelightVision vision = LimelightVision.getInstance();
086
087    private final LEDController leds = LEDController.getInstance();
088
089    private final Handoff handoff = Handoff.getInstance();
090
091    // Autons
092    private static SendableChooser<Command> autonChooser = new SendableChooser<>();
093
094    // Robot container
095
096    /** The container for the robot. Contains subsystems, OI devices, and commands. */
097    public RobotContainer() {
098        swerve.configureAutoBuilder();
099        configureDefaultCommands();
100        configureButtonBindings();
101        configureAutons();
102        SmartDashboard.putData("Field", Field.FIELD2D);
103    }
104
105    /** ************ */
106    /** DEFAULTS ** */
107    /** ************ */
108    private void configureDefaultCommands() {
109        swerve.setDefaultCommand(new SwerveDriveDrive(driver));
110        leds.setDefaultCommand(new LEDDefaultCommand());
111    }
112
113    /***************/
114    /*** BUTTONS ***/
115    /***************/
116
117    /**
118     * This method is used to configure button bindings for controlling the robot.
119   */
120    private void configureButtonBindings() {
121        // Trigger buttons did not work for some reason so I had to do this
122        Trigger leftTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getLeftTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
123        Trigger rightTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getRightTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
124
125        leftTrigger.onTrue(new IntakeSetIntake());
126        driver.leftBumper().whileTrue(new IntakeSetOuttake());
127        driver.leftBumper().onFalse(new IntakeSetIntake());
128
129        rightTrigger.whileTrue(
130            new SwerveDriveAlignToHub().withDeadline(new WaitCommand(1.5))
131                .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
132                .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
133                .andThen(new ShooterSetShoot())
134                .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
135                .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly()));
136        rightTrigger.onFalse(
137            new StopShooting()
138        );
139
140        // Top Left Paddle
141        driver.y().onTrue(new IntakeSetIdle());
142        
143        driver.rightBumper()
144            .whileTrue(
145                new SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone().withDeadline(new WaitCommand(1.5))
146                    .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
147                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
148                    .andThen(new ShooterSetFerry())
149                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
150                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly()));
151        driver.rightBumper()
152            .onFalse(
153                new StopShooting()
154            );
155        // Manual shooting possibly from in front of the tower
156        driver.a()
157            .whileTrue(
158                new SwerveDriveXMode()
159                    .andThen(new ShooterSetManual())
160                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
161                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward().repeatedly())
162                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward().repeatedly(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly()));
163        driver.a()
164            .onFalse(
165                new StopShooting()
166            );
167
168        driver.b()  
169            .whileTrue(
170                new SwerveDriveXMode()
171                    .andThen(new ShooterSetShoot())
172                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
173                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward().repeatedly())
174                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward().repeatedly(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly())
175            );
176        driver.b()
177            .onFalse(
178                new StopShooting()
179            );
180
181        // Bottom Left Paddle
182        driver.x().whileTrue(new SwerveDriveXMode());
183
184        driver.povLeft().onTrue(new SwerveDriveResetRotation());
185        
186        driver.povUp()
187            .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(50));
188        driver.povDown()
189            .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(-50));
190        driver.povRight()
191            .onTrue(new ShooterResetBonusVelocity());
192
193    }
194
195    /**************/
196    /*** AUTONS ***/
197    /**************/
198
199    /**
200     * This method is used to configure the autonomous commands.
201     */
202     public void configureAutons() {
203        autonChooser.addOption("Do Nothing", new DoNothingAuton());
204        // AutonConfig LBFerry = new AutonConfig("LB Ferry", LBFerry::new,
205        // "LB to N Ferry",
206        // "N to LT Ferry",
207        // "LT Hub Ferry",
208        // "N to Depot Ferry");
209        // LBFerry.register(autonChooser);
210        // AutonConfig RBFerry = new AutonConfig("RB Ferry", RBFerry::new,
211        // "RB to N Ferry",
212        // "N to RT Ferry",
213        // "RT Hub Ferry",
214        // "N to Outpost Ferry");
215        // RBFerry.register(autonChooser);
216        // AutonConfig TwoMeterPath = new AutonConfig("Two Meter Path",
217        // TwoMeterPath::new,
218        // "2 meter path");
219        // TwoMeterPath.register(autonChooser);
220        // AutonConfig OutpostOnly = new AutonConfig("Outpost Only", OutpostOnly::new,
221        // "Outpost");
222        // OutpostOnly.register(autonChooser);
223        // AutonConfig RBOuttake = new AutonConfig("RB Outtake", RBOuttake::new,
224        // "RB to N Outtake",
225        // "N to RB Outtake");
226        // RBOuttake.register(autonChooser);
227        // AutonConfig LBOuttake = new AutonConfig("LB Outtake", LBOuttake::new,
228        // "LB to N Outtake",
229        // "N to LB Outtake");
230        // LBOuttake.register(autonChooser);
231        // AutonConfig LBDisrupt = new AutonConfig("LB Disrupt", LBDisrupt::new,
232        // "LB to CN Disrupt",
233        // "LN Circle Disrupt",
234        // "LN Circle Disrupt",
235        // "LB Disrupt Return");
236        // LBDisrupt.register(autonChooser);
237        // AutonConfig RBDisrupt = new AutonConfig("RB Disrupt", RBDisrupt::new,
238        // "RB to CN Disrupt",
239        // "RN Circle Disrupt",
240        // "RN Circle Disrupt",
241        // "RB Disrupt Return");
242        // RBDisrupt.register(autonChooser);
243        // AutonConfig LT_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("LT Disrupt", LTDisrupt::new,
244        // "LT to N Disrupt",
245        // "LT Circle Disrupt",
246        // "LT Circle Disrupt",
247        // "LT Side Push Disrupt",
248        // "LT Around Disrupt",
249        // "LT Back Push Disrupt");
250        // LT_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
251        // AutonConfig RT_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("RT Disrupt", RTDisrupt::new,
252        // "RT to N Disrupt",
253        // "RT Circle Disrupt",
254        // "RT Circle Disrupt",
255        // "RT Side Push Disrupt",
256        // "RT Around Disrupt",
257        // "RT Back Push Disrupt");
258        // RT_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
259
260        // DOT
261        AutonConfig LB_ToBCCenter = new AutonConfig("LB To BC Center", LBCenterDotDot::new,
262            "LB to BC Center"
263        );
264        LB_ToBCCenter.register(autonChooser);
265        AutonConfig LB_ToBCLeft = new AutonConfig("LB To BC Left", LeftDot::new,
266            "LB to BC Left"
267        );
268        LB_ToBCLeft.register(autonChooser);
269        AutonConfig RB_ToBCCenter = new AutonConfig("RB To BC Center", RBCenterDotDot::new,
270            "RB to BC Center"
271        );
272        RB_ToBCCenter.register(autonChooser);
273        AutonConfig RB_ToBCRight = new AutonConfig("RB To BC Right", RightDot::new,
274            "RB to BC Right"
275        );
276        RB_ToBCRight.register(autonChooser);
277
278        // SHOOT
279        AutonConfig frontHubShootPreloads = new AutonConfig("Front Hub Shoot Preloads", FrontHubShootPreloads::new,
280            "Front Hub Shoot Preloads"
281        );
282        frontHubShootPreloads.register(autonChooser);
283        AutonConfig LB_OneSweepAngled = new AutonConfig("LB 1 Sweep Angled", LBOneSweepAngled::new,
284            "LB to Mid Neutral RF",
285            "Mid Neutral RF to LB Shoot"
286        );
287        LB_OneSweepAngled.register(autonChooser);
288        AutonConfig LB_TwoSweepAngled = new AutonConfig("LB 2 Sweep Angled", LBTwoSweepAngled::new, 
289            "LB to Mid Neutral RF",
290            "Mid Neutral RF to LB Shoot",
291            "LB Shoot to LB Start",
292            "LB to Mid Neutral RF",
293            "Mid Neutral RF to LB Shoot"
294        );
295        LB_TwoSweepAngled.register(autonChooser);
296        AutonConfig LB_OnePointFiveSpiralAngled = new AutonConfig("LB 1.5 Spiral Angled", LBOnePointFiveSpiralAngled::new, 
297            "LB to Mid Neutral RF",
298            "Mid Neutral RF Spiral",
299            "Mid Neutral RF to LB Shoot",
300            "LB Shoot to LB Start",
301            "LB to Mid Neutral RF"
302        );
303        LB_OnePointFiveSpiralAngled.register(autonChooser);
304
305        AutonConfig LB_Dumpy = new AutonConfig("LB Dumpy", LBDumpy::new,
306            "LB to N Dumpy",
307            "LB Intake Dumpy",
308            "LB Backsweep Dumpy",
309            "LB Shoot Dumpy");
310        LB_Dumpy.register(autonChooser);
311
312        // AutonConfig RB_Dumpy = new AutonConfig("RB Dumpy", RBDumpy::new,
313        //     "RB to N Dumpy",
314        //     "RB Intake Dumpy",
315        //     "RB Backsweep Dumpy",
316        //     "RB Shoot Dumpy");
317        // RB_Dumpy.register(autonChooser);
318
319        AutonConfig centerDepot = new AutonConfig("Center Depot", CenterDepot::new,
320            "Hub to Depot",
321            "Tower shoot");
322        centerDepot.register(autonChooser);
323
324        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Forwards",
325        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kForward));
326        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Backwards",
327        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
328        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Forwards",
329        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kForward));
330        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Backwards",
331        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kReverse));
332        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Forwards",
333        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kForward));
334        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Backwards",
335        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
336        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Forwards",
337        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kForward));
338        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Backwards",
339        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kReverse));
340        SmartDashboard.putData("Autonomous", autonChooser);
341    }
342
343    /**
344     * Use this to pass the autonomous command to the main {@link Robot} class.
345     * @return The command to run in autonomous
346     */
347    public Command getAutonomousCommand() {
348        return autonChooser.getSelected();
349    }
350}
